{{Quote|If ''I'' were you, Vorol, I'd tell Chewie where that bounty hunter, ''Bossk'', was hangin' out. But then, I've always had this silly fondness for keeping my ''head'' connected to my ''body''...|Lando Calrissian|<ref name="SW69" />}}
'''Vorol''' was an [[Alien/Legends|alien]] who lived on [[The Wheel/Legends|the Wheel]] [[Space station/Legends|space station]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] leaders [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], who were searching for information on the whereabouts of the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Bossk/Legends|Bossk]], were led to believe that Vorol knew their target's whereabouts. After being threatened by Chewbacca, Vorol revealed that Bossk had gone<ref name="SW69" /> to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Stenos/Legends|Stenos]].<ref name="SW70">[[Star Wars (1977) 70|''Star Wars'' (1977) 70]]</ref>
